HomePage.welcomeDescription: Your ARC Raiders desktop command hub for blueprints, stash, quests, hideout progress, raid history, maps, items, and player tools.
HomePage.privacyNoticeText: Your local tracker data stays in your browser unless you connect an account or sync game data.
HomePage.itemsDatabaseDescription: Browse items, blueprints, maps, events, and progression systems.
HomePage.interactiveMapsDescription: Explore ARC Raiders maps, locations, and events.
HomePage.communityNewsText: Help improve the ShiestyRaiders item, quest, blueprint, stash, and raid database.
HomePage.discordCommunityDescription: Share feedback, report bugs, request tools, and help improve the ARC Raiders companion hub.
HomePage.lfgDescription: Find raiders, trade, squad up, and plan routes with the community.

stashCta.title: Sync Your ShiestyRaiders Account
stashCta.description: Link your game account to sync stash, workshops, quests, projects, blueprints, loadout, and progression.

dashboard.title: ShiestyRaiders Command Hub
dashboard.intro: Your ARC Raiders desktop hub for blueprints, items, maps, raid stats, progression, stash, and marketplace tools.

tools.schedule: Track live map events, rotations, timers, and expedition activity.
tools.craftCalculator: Plan projects, upgrades, crafting paths, and required materials.
tools.quests: Track quests, objectives, rewards, and required progression steps.
tools.lootHelper: Browse item data, needed materials, stash planning, and recycle decisions.
tools.quartermaster: Manage hideout planning, workshop progress, and upgrade requirements.
tools.stats: Review raid history, player performance, kills, value, and synced stats.
tools.blueprints: Track learned blueprints, missing plans, duplicates, and blueprint locations.
tools.market: Watch marketplace movement, listings, offers, and item value signals.

changelog.title: Latest Intel
changelog.intro: Recent updates across the ShiestyRaiders toolset.

BlueprintsTab.allBlueprintsLearned: Congratulations! You've learned all available blueprints.

guide.trackingDesc: Click any blueprint card to open the detail panel. Mark blueprints as learned, add duplicates, or record where you found them.
guide.statusDesc: A bright card badge means the blueprint is learned. A yellow badge shows how many duplicates you own.
guide.filtersDesc: Use search and dropdowns to filter by name, category, or collection status.

BlueprintSync.title: Sync Blueprints
BlueprintSync.description: Import your learned blueprints from your linked account.
BlueprintSync.noChangesDescription: Your blueprints are already up to date.
BlueprintSync.blueprintsToUpdate: {count, plural, one {# blueprint} other {# blueprints}} to update

RaidSync.title: Apply to Progress
RaidSync.description: Apply items from this raid to your needed items tracker.
RaidSync.noMatchingItems: No items from this raid match your current needs.
RaidSync.blueprintsFound: {count, plural, one {# blueprint found} other {# blueprints found}}
RaidSync.applySuccessDescription: Added {items} items. {requirements} requirements complete. {blueprints, plural, =0 {} one {# blueprint learned.} other {# blueprints learned.}}
RaidSync.applySuccessItems: {count, plural, one {# item added} other {# items added}}
RaidSync.applySuccessRequirements: {count, plural, one {# requirement complete} other {# requirements complete}}
RaidSync.applySuccessBlueprints: {count, plural, one {# blueprint learned} other {# blueprints learned}}
RaidSync.undoSuccessDescription: Removed {items} items from your tracker. {blueprints, plural, =0 {} one {# blueprint unlearned.} other {# blueprints unlearned.}}

MapEvents.tutorialStep1: Click the bell icon on any event to track it.
MapEvents.tutorialStep2: When a tracked event starts, a notification appears.
MapEvents.tutorialStep3: Enable sound alerts with the speaker icon.
MapEvents.tutorialStep5: Tracked events are saved to your account.

LeaderboardsPage.notRanked: You are not ranked for this leaderboard yet.
LeaderboardsPage.signInHint: Sign in to jump to your rank.
LeaderboardsPage.emptyDescription: This leaderboard will appear after eligible synced rounds.
LeaderboardsPage.searchResults: Search results keep each player's true global rank.

QuestsPage.noQuestsMatch: No quests match the current filter.
QuestsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search quests by name, description, or trader...
QuestsPage.completeRequiredQuestsDescription: This quest requires completing other quests first.

NeededItemsPage.noActiveItems: No items currently needed for active tasks.
NeededItemsPage.cheatsheetDescription: Reference for items needed for quests, hideout upgrades, and project phases.
NeededItemsPage.safeToRecycleDescription: Items not needed for remaining progression based on tracked progress.

HideoutPage.noItemRequirements: No item requirements for next level.

ProjectsPage.submitItemsValue: Submit items worth the required value to complete this phase.
ProjectsPage.earnedDuringExpedition: Progress accumulates while inside the expedition window.

WorkbenchPage.noCraftableItems: No craftable items found for this workbench.
WorkbenchPage.itemsAddedLater: Items may be added in future updates.

ItemDetailPage.itemNotFoundDescription: The item you are looking for does not exist.

TraderPage.traderNotFoundDesc: The trader you're looking for doesn't exist.

RaidHistoryPage.betaTooltip: This feature is in beta and may change over time.
RaidHistoryPage.addRaidDescription: Log a new raid with items extracted and outcome.
RaidHistoryPage.editRaidDescription: Update the details of this raid.
RaidHistoryPage.loadError: Failed to load data. Please try again.
RaidHistoryPage.signInDescription: Sign in to track your raid history and view statistics.
RaidHistoryPage.noRaidsWithFilters: No raids match your current filters.
RaidHistoryPage.noRaidsYet: Start tracking your raids to see them here.
RaidHistoryPage.syncSuccess: Synced {count, plural, one {# new round} other {# new rounds}}

embarkStats.connectDesc: Link your Embark account to unlock stats — survival rate, kills, damage, value extracted, and more.
embarkStats.emptyState: No raid data yet. Play ARC Raiders to see your stats here.

StashPage.title: Stash
StashPage.signInDescription: Sign in to access your stash and link your ARC Raiders account.
StashPage.extensionRequiredDescription: The ShiestyRaiders browser extension is required to link your ARC Raiders account.
StashPage.installExtensionFirst: Install the browser extension to enable account linking.
StashPage.unsupportedBrowser: You need Chrome or Firefox to install the extension.
StashPage.linkDescription: Connect your ARC Raiders account to enable stash synchronization.
StashPage.linkBannerDescription: Link your ARC Raiders account to sync hideout progress, completed quests, blueprints, and stash data.
StashPage.tokenExpiredDescription: Your session has expired. Refresh the connection to continue syncing.
StashPage.unlinkDialogDescription: This will remove the connection to your ARC Raiders account.
StashPage.unlinkError: Failed to unlink ARC Raiders account.
StashPage.comingSoonDescription: Once linked, you'll be able to view and manage your in-game stash inventory here.
StashPage.syncCenterDescription: Synchronize your game progress from your linked ARC Raiders account.
StashPage.hideoutSyncDescription: Sync your workshop levels from your game account.
StashPage.questSyncDescription: Sync your completed quests from your game account.
StashPage.projectsSyncDescription: Sync your project progress from your game account.
StashPage.blueprintSyncDescription: Sync learned blueprints from your game account.
StashPage.linkAccountFirst: Link your account to enable sync
StashPage.minutesAgo: {count, plural, one {# minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
StashPage.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
StashPage.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

inventory.linkRequiredDescription: Link your ARC Raiders account to view your stash inventory.
inventory.tokenExpiredDescription: Refresh your ARC Raiders connection to view your inventory.
inventory.notSyncedDescription: Sync your inventory from your linked ARC Raiders account to view your items.

loadout.title: Loadout
loadout.syncToSee: Sync your inventory to see your loadout

settings.stashSourceOfTruthDescription: When enabled, items in your synced stash count toward quest, hideout, and project requirements.

SettingsPage.backupRestoreDescription: Download a backup of your data or restore from a previous backup file.
SettingsPage.resetDataDescription: Reset all tracked progress to default states.
SettingsPage.resetSuccess: All application data has been reset.
SettingsPage.embarkGameAccountDescription: Link your ARC Raiders account to sync stash and inventory.
SettingsPage.embarkExtensionRequiredDescription: Install the ShiestyRaiders extension to link your game account.
SettingsPage.embarkNotLinked: Your ARC Raiders account is not linked yet.
SettingsPage.embarkGoToStash: Go to Stash to link your account

Metadata.homeDescription: ARC Raiders companion hub for blueprints, stash, quests, maps, items, market, raid history, and progression.

Metadata.mapsDescription: Explore interactive maps with markers, extracts, locations, events, and loot.
Metadata.hideoutDescription: Track hideout module upgrades, requirements, and progression.
Metadata.projectsDescription: Track research projects and phase requirements.
Metadata.neededItemsDescription: Track all items needed for quests, hideout upgrades, and projects.

Metadata.safeToRecycleDescription: Items safe to recycle based on your tracked progress.

Metadata.mapEventsDescription: See active and upcoming ARC Raiders map events.

TermsPage.linksContent: This service may contain links to third-party websites or services.
TermsPage.contactContent: Contact ShiestyRaiders support through the community channels.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.introSection: ShiestyRaiders provides ARC Raiders companion tools and account-linked sync features.
PrivacyPage.infoCollectionContent: We collect data needed to provide and improve the service.
PrivacyPage.usageDataContent: Usage data may include browser, device, and page interaction information.
PrivacyPage.cookiesContent: Cookies may be used to keep sessions and preferences working.
PrivacyPage.useOfDataContent: Data is used to provide account features, sync progress, improve tools, and maintain service reliability.
PrivacyPage.contactContent: Contact ShiestyRaiders support through the community channels.

Subscription.subscribePageSubtitle: Support ShiestyRaiders and enjoy an ad-free experience

AppsPage.pageDescription: Enhance your ARC Raiders experience with ShiestyRaiders companion tools.
